requirementCueLines: Below is information about the credit requirements for the Bachelor of Arts in Business Administration (BABA) degree from the Foster School. Meet with an academic adviser in the Undergraduate Program Office to clarify your educational and career goals and make long-range plans to achieve them once you have been accepted to the Foster School.
In addition to the Lower Division Business Courses, you must complete four non-business prerequisite courses:

sourceLineHints: Below is information about the credit requirements for the Bachelor of Arts in Business Administration (BABA) degree from the Foster School. Meet with an academic adviser in the Undergraduate Program Office to clarify your educational and career goals and make long-range plans to achieve them once you have been accepted to the Foster School.
In addition to the Lower Division Business Courses, you must complete four non-business prerequisite courses:
